Package javadraw

package javadraw
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    javadraw.builders
     
    javadraw.errors
     
    javadraw.ui
     
  • Class
    Description
    Border
    Utility class to manage borders, which at the moment create secondary objects around a primary object.
    Color
    Represents a Color in the RGB format.
    CustomPolygon
    A custom polygon with user-defined vertices.
    CustomRenderable
    Designation interface for Renderables that are special or set apart from default Renderables in some way.
    DrawableObject
    An Object which is Drawable on the Screen (Renderables and non-Renderables).
    Image
    Represents an image rendered onto the Screen.
    Key
    Represents a Key, allowing for easy comparison in keyEvent handlers.
    KeyConstants
    Defines constants for key event types.
    KeyEventListener
    Specialization of EventListener that provides the values in a more user-friendly way.
    Line
    Represents a Line on the Screen.
    Location
    A class designed to store locations on the Cartesian plane.
    MouseConstants
     
    MouseEventListener
     
    MouseTools
     
    MultiRenderable
     
    MultiRenderableMember
     
    Oval
    Any circular or oval-like Object on the Screen.
    Polygon
    A regular polygon with a specified "n" number of sides.
    Rectangle
    Represents a classical rectangular Object on the Screen.
    Renderable
     
    RoundedRectangle
     
    Screen
    The accessor to manage and use the Window.
    Text
    Class to represent text in javaDraw.
    Transform
     
    Triangle
    Represents any Triangular object on Screen.
    Window
    The primary thread-controller for the application, the Window passes inputs and is meant to be the parent of any javaDraw program.
